name: Braided Seagrass Small Bin - Brightroom™
description:
The Braided Seagrass Small Bin from Brightroom™ makes a practical yet stylish addition to your home decor. Woven from seagrass, this braided small bin in a lacquered finish brings extra visual interest and textural flair to any home space. This rectangular small bin features an open top to make it easy to stash away and remove the contents, and side cut-out handles make it easy to carry around the house.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
